# 2026-07-01: 4444 spark image failure is not direct cleanup
- Evidence: latest 4444 sample `openai-responses-router-gpt-5.5-20260701T121608549-439094-131` fails first hop with upstream HTTP 400 `model "gpt-5.3-codex-spark" does not support image input`; its `providerRequestShape.hasMetadata=false` and input item types are valid, so this is not MetadataCenter leakage.
- Direct boundary fix: removed `normalizeResponsesInputItemsForProviderWireNative` / `applyDirectResponsesProviderWireNormalization` from router-direct; direct must not clean or normalize Responses input before provider send.
- Verification: `npm run jest:run -- tests/server/runtime/http-server/router-direct-pipeline.spec.ts --runInBand` PASS 25/25; `npm run verify:responses-direct-tool-shape-no-ts-fallback` PASS; root `npx tsc --noEmit --pretty false` PASS.
- Remaining root direction: spark image error belongs to provider capability truth / VR provider eligibility. Current config marks `gpt-5.3-codex-spark` as `multimodal`, but upstream rejects image input; fix must be in capability/selection truth, not direct payload cleanup.

# 2026-07-01: Anthropic SSE decode failure metadata synthesis removed
- Red evidence: focused `sse-parser-no-recovery` first failed because generic malformed Anthropic SSE decode errors were wrapped with synthesized `upstreamCode=ANTHROPIC_SSE_TO_JSON_FAILED`, `status=502`, and `retryable=true`; `verify:sse-architecture-boundary` first failed on `resolveSseFailureMetadata()` and message-based timeout/incomplete/terminated classifiers.
- Fix: `AnthropicSseToJsonConverter.wrapError()` now only preserves explicit `upstreamCode` / `statusCode|status` / `retryable` already present on the original error. Generic decode errors keep `code=ANTHROPIC_SSE_TO_JSON_FAILED` and `requestExecutorProviderErrorStage=provider.sse_decode` without synthesizing provider failure metadata.
- Build blocker resolved: `build:base` initially failed because `verify-servertool-rust-only` still required deleted servertool handler contract/runtime-action NAPI exports; gate now asserts those old exports/wrappers are absent and only requires the materialization/progress native surface.
- Verification: focused Anthropic/Gemini/Responses parser Jest PASS 10/10; provider failure-stage/empty-SSE Jest PASS; servertool focused Jest PASS 5/5; `verify:sse-architecture-boundary`, `verify:responses-sse-business-module`, `verify:hub-response-provider-sse-materialization`, `verify:servertool-rust-only`, `verify:function-map-compile-gate`, sharedmodule/root `tsc`, `build:base BUILD_STATUS:0`, `git diff --check`, and real 4444 Responses SSE replay PASS. Build generated version `0.90.3416`; local Anthropic sample is HTTP 429 error-only, so no Anthropic success replay sample is available.

# 2026-07-01: servertool handler materialization action moved to Rust
- Slice: `materializeServertoolPlannedResult()` no longer branches in TS for missing `finalize` / invalid handler result. It now calls `planServertoolHandlerMaterializationForPlannedWithNative(planned, requestId)` and only executes the Rust-returned action: finalize, throw Rust-owned error plan, or return handler result.
- Build blocker: first `npm run build:base` waited on Cargo package/artifact file locks; no code compile error was found. The lock cleared and native build completed, producing `0.90.3414`.
- Verification: focused Jest `execution-handler-materialization-shell + servertool-active-orchestration-audit` PASS 43/43; Rust `cargo test -p servertool-core execution_handler_contract --lib -- --nocapture` PASS 3/3; `verify:servertool-rust-only`, sharedmodule/root `tsc --noEmit --pretty false`, `verify:function-map-compile-gate`, `verify:architecture-mainline-call-map`, `build-native-hotpath`, `git diff --check`, and `build:base` PASS.

# 2026-07-01: Chat SSE finish_reason fallback removed
- Red evidence: focused `chat-sse-usage-no-fallback` first showed missing `choices[0].finish_reason` was synthesized into `"finish_reason":"stop"` and `[DONE]`; `verify:sse-architecture-boundary` first failed on the old `finish_reason` inference markers in `chat-sequencer.ts`.
- Fix: Chat JSON->SSE now requires explicit `finish_reason`; missing/blank finish reason emits the native error path with `Invalid ChatCompletionResponse choice: missing finish_reason`, and no synthesized `stop` / `[DONE]` is emitted.
- Verification: focused Jest `chat-sse-usage-no-fallback + chat-sse-function-call-args-no-fallback` PASS 11/11; `verify:sse-architecture-boundary`, `verify:responses-sse-business-module`, `verify:function-map-compile-gate`, sharedmodule/root `tsc --noEmit --pretty false`, real 4444 Responses SSE replay, `git diff --check`, and `build:base` PASS. Build generated version `0.90.3412`.

# 2026-07-01: Chat SSE tool_call arguments skip removed
- Red evidence: `verify:sse-architecture-boundary` first failed on `if (!args) return;` in `event-generators/chat.ts` and `if (toolCall.function?.arguments) {` in `chat-sequencer.ts`; focused `chat-sse-function-call-args-no-fallback` added missing `message.tool_calls[].function.arguments` coverage.
- Fix: Chat JSON->SSE no longer silently skips malformed modern `tool_calls` arguments; the path now enters Rust/NAPI `buildChatSseToolCallArgsDeltaPayloadWithNative()`, where missing `arguments` fails fast with `Chat SSE tool call args delta payload missing arguments` and no `finish_reason=tool_calls` / `[DONE]` is emitted.
- Verification: native hotpath build PASS; focused Jest `chat-sse-function-call-args-no-fallback` PASS 6/6; `verify:sse-architecture-boundary`, `verify:responses-sse-business-module`, `verify:function-map-compile-gate`, sharedmodule/root `tsc --noEmit --pretty false`, real 4444 Responses SSE replay, `git diff --check`, and `build:base` PASS. Build generated version `0.90.3411`.

# 2026-07-01: SSE handler stale repair coverage removed and build version generated
- Slice already committed in two steps: `4bbb94552 fix(sse): drop handler terminal repair spec` deletes the stale handler terminal repair regression and locks it with `verify:responses-handler-single-bridge-surface`; `a00bf68f6 test(sse): trim stale handler repair coverage` trims `handler-response-sse-write-after-end.regression.spec.ts` to transport-only late-write/no-uncaught coverage.

# 2026-07-01: servertool timeout env priority moved to Rust
- Slice: `engine-orchestration-shell.ts` no longer maps timeout env names and finds the first truthy value in TS; it now passes env candidates to native `resolveServertoolTimeoutMsFromEnvCandidatesWithNative()`, where Rust `orchestration_policy_contract.rs` owns candidate priority, empty-value skip, numeric parse, and invalid-value fail-fast.
- Gate: `servertool-active-orchestration-audit` and `verify-servertool-rust-only` require the new native resolver and forbid the old `parseServertoolTimeoutMsWithNative({ raw: raw || undefined })` / `.map(...).find(...)` TS shape in the engine shell.

- Commit scope note: unrelated SSE dirty files remain and are excluded from this servertool slice.

# 2026-07-01: servertool execution branch projected tool call moved to Rust plan
- Slice: `execution_branch_contract.rs` now returns `projected_tool_call{id,name,arguments}` for CLI projection branches; `execution-stage-shell.ts` no longer reads `dispatchPlan.executableToolCalls[projectedToolCallIndex]` or builds the missing-index error string locally.

# 2026-07-01: direct provider-wire normalization and provider-response requestId fail-fast
- Slice: `router-direct-pipeline.ts` now normalizes OpenAI Responses `input` through native `normalizeResponsesInputItemsForProviderWireNative()` before `processIncomingDirect()`, and `provider-response.ts` fails fast when `context.requestId` is missing instead of synthesizing `unknown`.
- Fix: native bridge export now treats invalid normalized entries as hard errors instead of filtering them out; `router-direct-pipeline.spec.ts` now asserts the normalized direct payload shape without the old `type: message` wrapper.

# 2026-07-01: native bridge binding compile blocker
- Finding: root `tsc` failed because `NativeRouterHotpathJsonBinding` did not list `captureReqInboundResponsesContextSnapshotJson`, and `assertNativeObject()` incorrectly required its label to be a native binding key.
- Fix: add the real router-hotpath JSON capability key and make `assertNativeObject()` accept a plain string label, avoiding a fake `normalizeResponsesInputItemsForProviderWireNative` native capability.
- Verification: root `tsc` PASS; direct pipeline Jest PASS 24/24; `verify:sse-architecture-boundary`, `verify:responses-sse-business-module`, `verify:function-map-compile-gate`, and `build:base` PASS; `git diff --check` PASS.

# 2026-07-01: Responses SSE decode failure metadata synthesis removed
- Red evidence: `verify:sse-architecture-boundary` first failed after adding markers for `resolveSseFailureMetadata()` and local message-based upstream/status/retryable synthesis in `responses-sse-to-json-converter.ts`.
- Fix: removed TS failure metadata classifier; Responses SSE decode now only preserves explicit `upstreamCode` / `statusCode` / `retryable` fields already present on the source error, while malformed generic decode errors no longer get synthesized provider failure metadata.

# 2026-07-01: Handler SSE error frame projection moved to ErrorErr06 owner
- Red evidence: `verify:responses-handler-single-bridge-surface` first failed after adding a marker forbidding `projectSseErrorEventPayload` in `handler-response-sse.ts`.
- Fix: `handler-response-sse.ts` now imports `buildSseErrorEventFrame()` from `http-error-mapper.ts`; handler writes the prebuilt frame and only uses the returned payload for diagnostics, while the ErrorErr06 mapper owns payload/frame projection.
- Verification: focused handler/error Jest PASS 21/21; `verify:responses-handler-single-bridge-surface`, `verify:responses-sse-business-module`, `verify:sse-architecture-boundary`, `verify:hub-response-provider-sse-materialization`, sharedmodule/root `tsc`, and real 4444 sample replay PASS. `build:base` log reached final `fix:cli-permission` step and bumped version to `0.90.3408`, but the wrapper did not capture an explicit `EXIT_STATUS`.

# 2026-07-01: servertool postflight session truth removed from TS
- Slice: `engine-postflight-shell.ts` no longer reads/trims `metadataCenterSnapshot.requestTruth.sessionId`; it passes the metadata-center snapshot carrier to native `buildStoplessAutoCliProjectionFromEngineWithNative()`, where Rust `stopless_auto_handler_bridge.rs` owns session truth extraction.
- Gate: `servertool-active-orchestration-audit` and `verify-servertool-rust-only` now forbid `const requestTruth = metadataCenterSnapshot?.requestTruth`, `const rawSessionId = requestTruth?.sessionId`, and `rawSessionId.trim()` in postflight.

# 2026-07-01: servertool auto-hook error message normalization moved to Rust
- Slice: `auto-hook-caller.ts` no longer normalizes caught hook errors with `String(error ?? 'unknown')`; TS now only passes a string/Error.message carrier and Rust `auto_hook_runtime_contract.rs` owns error outcome, trim, and `unknown` trace reason.
- Red evidence: new Rust blank-message assertion first failed because blank message was treated as `planned_null`; fixed by making message field presence select Rust error outcome while Rust text normalization decides `unknown`.
- Gate: `servertool-active-orchestration-audit` and `verify-servertool-rust-only` now forbid the old TS message normalization markers in `auto-hook-caller.ts`.
- Verification: `cargo test -p servertool-core auto_hook_runtime --lib -- --nocapture` PASS 2/2; `cargo test -p router-hotpath-napi plans_auto_hook_runtime_attempt_via_servertool_core_bridge --lib -- --nocapture` PASS 1/1; sharedmodule `tsc` PASS; `build-native-hotpath` PASS; focused Jest `servertool-auto-hook-trace + auto-hook-config + failfast + active audit` PASS 58/58; `verify:servertool-rust-only` PASS; `verify:function-map-compile-gate` PASS; `verify:architecture-mainline-call-map` PASS; scoped `rustfmt --check` and `git diff --check` PASS.
- Commit scope note: unrelated dirty files remain from other/generated work (`package*`, `src/build-info.ts`, SSE/Responses files); do not include them in this slice.

# 2026-07-01: servertool auto-hook final queue decision moved to Rust
- Slice: `auto-hook-caller.ts` no longer derives `finalQueueName` / `finalQueue`; it passes `queueIndex` and `queueTotal` facts to `planAutoHookCallerFinalizationWithNative()`, and Rust `auto_hook_runtime_contract.rs` decides whether to continue to the next queue or return null.
- Gate: `servertool-active-orchestration-audit` and `verify-servertool-rust-only` now forbid the old TS finalQueue markers and require `queueIndex: queueIndex + 1` plus `queueTotal: queueOrder.length`.
- Verification: `cargo test -p servertool-core auto_hook --lib -- --nocapture` PASS 10/10; `cargo test -p router-hotpath-napi plans_auto_hook_caller_finalization_via_servertool_core_bridge --lib -- --nocapture` PASS 1/1; `node sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/scripts/build-native-hotpath.mjs` PASS; focused Jest `servertool-auto-hook-trace + server-side-tools.failfast + servertool-active-orchestration-audit` PASS 46/46; sharedmodule `tsc` PASS; `verify:servertool-rust-only` PASS; `verify:function-map-compile-gate` PASS; `verify:architecture-mainline-call-map` PASS; scoped `rustfmt --check` and scoped `git diff --check` PASS.
- Known unrelated format gap: full `cargo fmt --check` still reports pre-existing dirty formatting in `shared_output_content_normalizer.rs` and `shared_responses_conversation_utils.rs`; those files are outside this slice and were not touched.
- Commit scope note: `note.md` already has unrelated dirty context; do not stage it with this auto-hook finalization slice.

# 2026-07-01: provider-direct abort signal missing
- Finding: provider-direct runtime metadata was attached without `abortSignal`, so direct provider contexts could keep running after client close.
- Fix: thread the live client abort signal into provider-direct runtime metadata and add a regression that reads the provider runtime symbol on the sent payload.

# 2026-07-01: 4444 502 triage
- Checked 4444 `openai-responses-router-gpt-5.5-20260701T071448432-436460-9770` and sibling 502 samples.
- Failing request shape is standard: `client_metadata/include/input/instructions/model/reasoning/store/stream/text/tool_choice/tools`; the sample shows `input.count=617` and `estimatedTextChars=320470`.
- Provider response is HTTP 502 / `upstream_error` or HTML `asxs.top | 502: Bad gateway`.
- Provider config for `ykk.gpt-5.4-mini` sets `maxContext=900000`, so no evidence of context overflow in this sample.
- Separate request-field failure exists on another 4444 sample: HTTP 400 `unsupported_parameter` for `reasoning.summary` on `gpt-5.3-codex-spark`.
- Current 502 conclusion: upstream gateway failure, not malformed request fields.

# 2026-07-01: Gemini SSE done metadata fail-fast
- Scope: SSE Rustification closeout, `sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/sse/sse-to-json/gemini-sse-to-json-converter.ts`.
- Finding: `gemini.done` still iterated `donePayload.candidates` with a silent skip for entries missing `index`, so malformed done metadata could disappear instead of failing.

# 2026-07-01 Gemini SSE decode scalar part fail-fast
- Scope: SSE Rustification closeout, `sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/sse/sse-to-json/gemini-sse-to-json-converter.ts`.
- Finding: decode-side `normalizeReasoningPart()` still returned `[part]` for non-object `gemini.data.part`, so scalar semantic data could materialize into candidate parts.

# 2026-07-01 Anthropic SSE empty text chunk skip removal
- Scope: SSE Rustification closeout, `sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/sse/json-to-sse/sequencers/anthropic-sequencer.ts`.
- Finding: `chunkText()` returned `[input]` for empty input and each text/thinking loop had `if (!chunk) continue;`, so empty text could silently emit start/stop without a delta.
- Fix: empty text now fail-fasts with `Invalid Anthropic text block: missing text`; chunk skip branches were removed; `verify:sse-architecture-boundary` forbids `if (!chunk) continue`.
- Verification: focused Anthropic Jest 12/12 PASS; `verify:sse-architecture-boundary` PASS; `verify:responses-sse-business-module` PASS; sharedmodule/root `tsc --noEmit --pretty false` PASS; `git diff --check` PASS; `build:base` PASS; `tsx` source replay valid path `eventCount=6` and empty path fail-fast. Real Anthropic success sample unavailable; only 429 provider-error sample found.

# 2026-07-01: SSE decode malformed chunk silent swallow removed
- Red evidence: focused `sse-parser-no-recovery` first failed because a `gemini.data` frame missing `data.part` resolved successfully as `candidates: []`; focused `chat-sse-no-salvage` first failed because a non-object `chat_chunk` after a valid response was skipped and the response still completed.
- Fix: `gemini-sse-to-json-converter.ts` now fail-fasts on missing Gemini data `part`; `chat-sse-to-json-converter.ts` now fail-fasts on non-object `chat_chunk` payloads instead of `continue`-skipping them. `verify:sse-architecture-boundary` locks both old swallow markers.

Gemini real provider-response samples are unavailable in current `~/.rcc/codex-samples`, so source replay/focused tests are the replay substitute.

# 2026-07-01: Responses SSE output_text missing text fails in Rust
- Red evidence: focused `responses-sse-output-item-descriptor-native` failed because `{ type: "output_text" }` still completed without `response.error`; source replay showed Rust content-part descriptor and message normalizer synthesized `text: ""`.
- Fix: removed TS text truthiness gates (`if (!text) return`, `&& !!content.text`, `if (!chunk) continue`) and removed Rust empty-text synthesis in Responses message/content-part payload owners. Missing `output_text.text` now emits `response.error` and stops before `output_text.done/completed/done`.
- Verification: Rust focused `responses_sse_event_payload` PASS 50/50 and `shared_output_content_normalizer` PASS 4/4; native build PASS; focused Jest PASS 11/11; `verify:sse-architecture-boundary` PASS; sharedmodule/root `tsc --noEmit` PASS; `verify:responses-sse-business-module` PASS; `build:base` PASS; source replay and real 4444 native frame replay PASS (`entryPort=4444`, parsed=8, completed=true, no response.error/missing text).

# 2026-07-01: Responses SSE function_call missing arguments must fail in native path
- Red evidence: `sequenceFunctionCallItem()` still used `if (item.arguments)` and `buildFunctionCallArgsDeltas()` used `if (!functionCall.arguments) return;`, so malformed function_call output could skip argument delta handling in TS before native validation.
- Fix: removed both truthiness gates. Function call arguments always enter `buildResponsesSseTextChunksWithNative()` and native payload builders; missing arguments now fail with `Responses SSE text chunk payload missing text` and stop before function_call_arguments.done/completed/done.
- Verification: focused Jest `responses-sse-output-item-descriptor-native` PASS 10/10; `verify:sse-architecture-boundary` PASS; sharedmodule/root `tsc --noEmit` PASS; `verify:responses-sse-business-module` PASS; `build:base` PASS; source replay confirmed valid args still emit delta/done/completed while missing args emits `response.error` only.

# 2026-07-01: Responses SSE reasoning summary entry missing text fails in Rust
- Red evidence: `buildReasoningSummaryEvents()` still used `normalizeResponsesSseReasoningSummaryWithNative(reasoning.summary) ?? []` and `if (!text) continue;`, while Rust `normalize_responses_sse_reasoning_summary()` skipped invalid summary entries. Focused Jest red showed missing summary text previously completed without `response.error`.
- Fix: Rust summary normalizer now treats null summary as empty but rejects non-array summary, invalid entries, missing text, and empty text. TS native wrapper returns an array, and `responses.ts` no longer has summary `?? []` or text-skip fallback.
- Verification: Rust `responses_sse_reasoning_summary` PASS 6/6; native build PASS; focused Jest `responses-sse-reasoning-summary-no-normalize` PASS 14/14; `verify:sse-architecture-boundary` PASS; sharedmodule/root `tsc --noEmit` PASS; `verify:responses-sse-business-module` PASS; `build:base` PASS; source replay confirmed missing summary text emits `response.error` and no completed/done.

# 2026-07-01: Responses SSE reasoning delta missing value must fail in Rust
- Red evidence: `tests/sharedmodule/responses-sse-reasoning-summary-no-normalize.spec.ts` showed missing `reasoning_text.text` still emitted `response.error` from native owner, while the old expectation for TS text-delta wording was stale.
- Fix: `sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/rust-core/crates/router-hotpath-napi/src/responses_sse_event_payload.rs` now rejects missing reasoning delta `value` with `Responses reasoning delta payload missing value`; TS `event-generators/responses.ts` no longer skips `if (!content.text) continue;`.
- Verification: focused Jest PASS 13/13; `npm run verify:sse-architecture-boundary` PASS; `npx tsc -p sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/tsconfig.json --noEmit --pretty false` PASS; root `tsc --noEmit --pretty false` PASS; `npm run verify:responses-sse-business-module` PASS; `node sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/scripts/build-native-hotpath.mjs` PASS; source replay confirmed invalid path emits `response.error` and no `response.completed` / `response.done`.

# 2026-07-01: Responses SSE response status fallback removed
- Red evidence：`verify:sse-architecture-boundary` 新增 `response.status ?? 'requires_action'` / `response.status ?? 'completed'` 禁止 marker 后先红；focused `responses-sse-usage-no-fallback` 也先红，证明缺失 `status` 会被合成 `in_progress/completed` 并成功输出 terminal frames。
- Fix：`responses-sequencer.ts::validateResponse()` 对缺失/空白 `response.status` 直接 fail-fast 抛 `Invalid Responses response: missing status`；`event-generators/responses.ts` 的 required_action/completed/done payload 全部只传 provider response 的显式 `status`，删除 TS 默认值。
- Verification：focused Jest `responses-sse-usage-no-fallback` 7/7 PASS；`verify:sse-architecture-boundary` PASS；sharedmodule/root `tsc --noEmit` PASS；`verify:responses-sse-business-module` PASS；`build:base` PASS；source replay `validCompleted=true validDone=true missingStatusError=true missingStatusCompleted=false missingStatusDone=false`。

# 2026-07-01: Gemini SSE scalar candidate part fail-fast removed silent emission
- Red evidence：`verify:sse-architecture-boundary` 新增 `if (!part || typeof part !== 'object') { return [part]; }` 禁止 marker 后先红；focused `gemini-sse-no-role-fallback` 也先红，证明 scalar candidate part 会被直接作为 `gemini.data` 发出。
- Fix：`normalizeReasoningPart()` 现在对非对象 `part` 直接 fail-fast 抛 `Invalid Gemini candidate part at index <n>`，不再返回原值并继续发 SSE。
- Verification：focused Jest `gemini-sse-no-role-fallback` 7/7 PASS；`verify:sse-architecture-boundary` PASS；sharedmodule/root `tsc --noEmit` PASS；`verify:responses-sse-business-module` PASS；`build:base` PASS；source replay `eventCount=2 dataEvents=1 doneEvents=1 scalarPartFailed=true`。真实 Gemini provider-response 样本缺口仍在。

# 2026-07-01: Gemini SSE null candidate fail-fast removed empty-object coercion
- Red evidence：`verify:sse-architecture-boundary` 新增 `candidates[candidateIndex] || {}` 禁止 marker 后先红；focused `gemini-sse-no-role-fallback` 也先红，证明 `null` candidate 会被静默改写成空对象再走 role 检查。
- Fix：`gemini-sequencer.ts` 新增 `getCandidateAtIndex()`；`null` / `undefined` candidate 直接 fail-fast 抛 `Invalid Gemini candidate at index <n>`，不再先转成 `{}`。

# 2026-07-01: Gemini SSE candidate parts empty-success fallback removed
- Red evidence：`verify:sse-architecture-boundary` 新增 `return [];` 禁止 marker 后先红；focused `gemini-sse-no-role-fallback` 也先红，证明候选有 role 但缺 `content.parts` 时会被当空 parts 继续输出 `gemini.done`。
- Fix：`gemini-sequencer.ts::getCandidateParts()` 对缺失/非数组 parts 直接 fail-fast 抛 `Invalid Gemini candidate: missing parts`；合法 parts 原样遍历，不再合成空候选。

# 2026-07-01: Gemini SSE candidates empty-success fallback removed
- Red evidence：`verify:sse-architecture-boundary` 新增 `Array.isArray(response.candidates) ? response.candidates : []` 禁止 marker 后先红；focused `gemini-sse-no-role-fallback` 也先红，证明缺失 `response.candidates` 会被当空数组继续输出 `gemini.done`。
- Fix：`gemini-sequencer.ts` 要求 `response.candidates` 必须是数组；缺失/非数组直接 fail-fast 抛 `Invalid Gemini response: missing candidates`，合法 candidates 原样遍历并输出 data/done。

# 2026-07-01: servertool auto-hook queue export removed
- Slice: `runAutoHookExecutionQueue` is no longer exported from `auto-hook-caller.ts`; runtime keeps it as an internal IO loop while the public surface remains `runServertoolAutoHookCaller`.
- Gate: `servertool-active-orchestration-audit` and `verify-servertool-rust-only` now forbid `export async function runAutoHookExecutionQueue(` from returning as a public TS orchestration surface.
- Verification: focused Jest `execution-shell.auto-hook-failfast + servertool-active-orchestration-audit` PASS 38/38; sharedmodule `tsc` PASS; `npm run verify:servertool-rust-only` PASS; `npm run verify:function-map-compile-gate` PASS; `npm run verify:architecture-mainline-call-map` PASS; `git diff --check` PASS.
- Known unrelated gap: `tests/servertool/servertool-auto-hook-trace.spec.ts` currently still has 2 existing mock-boundary failures where the test falls into real `stop_message_auto`; this slice does not change that runtime path and does not claim that suite is green.

# 2026-07-01: servertool entry preflight owns base-object detection
- Slice: removed local `chatResponse` object/base detection from `run-server-side-tool-engine-shell.ts`; `entry-preflight-shell.ts` now owns deriving the base object before calling native `planServertoolEntryPreflightWithNative`.
- Gate: `verify-servertool-rust-only` now forbids `const base =` / `typeof options.chatResponse === 'object'` in the top-level engine shell, keeping entry preflight as the owner.
- Verification: focused Jest `entry-preflight-shell`, `run-server-side-tool-engine-shell`, `servertool-active-orchestration-audit` PASS 37/37; sharedmodule `tsc` PASS; `npm run verify:servertool-rust-only` PASS; `npm run verify:function-map-compile-gate` PASS; `npm run verify:architecture-mainline-call-map` PASS; `git diff --check` PASS.

# 2026-07-01: servertool execution loop state wrapper collapsed
- Red-to-green slice: `execution-handler-materialization-shell.ts` no longer owns local `Set`-based execution loop state wrapper; TS `execution-queue-shell.ts` now consumes native `createServertoolExecutionLoopStateWithNative` / `appendServertoolExecutedRecordWithNative` directly and returns native array-based state.
- Removed TS wrapper surface: `createServertoolExecutionLoopStateFromNative`, `appendExecutedToolRecordFromNative`, `hydrateExecutionLoopState`, and the `Set` bridge in the queue path.
- Verification: focused Jest `execution-handler-materialization-shell`, `execution-queue-shell`, `execution-dispatch-outcome-shell`, `servertool-active-orchestration-audit`, `server-side-tools.dispatch-native`, `server-side-tools.failfast` PASS 45/45; `npm run verify:servertool-rust-only` PASS; `PATH=/opt/homebrew/opt/node@22/bin:$PATH npx tsc -p sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/tsconfig.json --pretty false` PASS; `npm run verify:function-map-compile-gate` PASS; `npm run verify:architecture-mainline-call-map` PASS; `git diff --check` PASS.

# 2026-07-01: Anthropic SSE timestamp synthesis removed

# 2026-07-01: Responses SSE decode TS wire synthesis removed
- Slice: `responses-sse-to-json-converter.ts` no longer serializes object-mode chunks into synthetic SSE wire frames; it now accepts only string/Buffer/Uint8Array wire chunks and fails fast on object chunks.
- Gate: `verify:sse-architecture-boundary` forbids `serializeEventToSSE()` and `event: data` fallback markers in the Responses SSE decode path.
- Verification: focused Jest `responses-sse-decode-no-ts-wire-synthesis + responses-sse-native-materialize + responses-sse-custom-tool-call-materialize` PASS; SSE boundary/business/provider-materialization gates PASS; sharedmodule/root `tsc` PASS; native build and `build:base` PASS; real 4444 provider-response wire replay PASS (`entryPort=4444`, `status=completed`, `outputCount=2`); `git diff --check` PASS.
- Red evidence：`verify:sse-architecture-boundary` 新增 `timestamp: Date.now()` marker 后先红；focused `gemini-sse-no-role-fallback` 也先红，证明 `gemini-sequencer.ts` 对每个 Gemini SSE event 合成本地 timestamp。
- Fix：`GeminiSseEvent` 不再继承要求 `timestamp` 的 `BaseSseEvent`，`createEvent()` 不再写 `timestamp: Date.now()`；Gemini writer/serializer 仍只依赖 `protocol` / `event` / `type` / `data`，合法 `gemini.data` / `gemini.done` wire 输出保持不变。
- Verification：focused Jest `gemini-sse-no-role-fallback` 3/3 PASS；`verify:sse-architecture-boundary` PASS；sharedmodule/root `tsc --noEmit` PASS；`verify:responses-sse-business-module` PASS；`verify:function-map-compile-gate` PASS；`build:base` PASS；`git diff --check` PASS；source replay `eventCount=2 dataEvents=1 doneEvents=1 hasSequenceNumber=false hasTimestamp=false hasPartText=true hasDone=true`。真实 Gemini 样本缺口同前：当前 `~/.rcc/codex-samples` 与 `/Volumes/extension/.rcc/codex-samples` 未找到 Gemini provider-response 样本。

# 2026-07-01: Gemini SSE fixed sequence number removed
- Red evidence：`verify:sse-architecture-boundary` 新增 `sequenceNumber: 0` marker 后先红；focused `gemini-sse-no-role-fallback` 也先红，证明 `gemini-sequencer.ts` 对每个 Gemini SSE event 合成固定 sequence truth。
- Fix：`createEvent()` 不再写 `sequenceNumber: 0`；Gemini serializer 只写 `event:` / `data:` wire frame，不依赖该内部字段。合法事件仍输出 `gemini.data` / `gemini.done`，但不再携带伪造序号。

# 2026-07-01: Chat SSE tool-call start payload Rust owner
- Red evidence：`verify:sse-architecture-boundary` 新增 Chat `arguments: ''` marker 后先红，证明 Chat tool-call start chunk payload 仍由 TS 合成。

# 2026-07-01: servertool orchestration native array fail-fast
- Issue：`orchestration-blocks.ts::nativeArray()` 对 native 返回数组执行 `.filter((entry): entry is JsonObject => ...)`，会静默丢弃非法 native entry，属于 TS 薄壳里的 silent swallow / 降级式容错。
- Fix：改为逐项 `map` 校验，遇到非 object 或 array entry 直接 fail-fast，错误包含非法 index；`verify-servertool-rust-only` 新增禁止旧 `.filter((entry): entry is JsonObject` marker 复活。
- Verification：focused Jest `orchestration-blocks.failfast + servertool-active-orchestration-audit` PASS 38/38；sharedmodule `tsc` PASS；`verify:servertool-rust-only` PASS；`verify:function-map-compile-gate` PASS；`verify:architecture-mainline-call-map` PASS；`git diff --check` PASS。

# 2026-06-30: Responses direct JSON client model restore Rust owner slice
- Red evidence：删除 `responses-response-bridge.js` 里的 `readResponsesRequestModelForHttp` / `ensureResponsesJsonToSseRequiredFieldsForHttp` 后，`responses-response-bridge.direct-json-protocol-guard.spec.ts` 先红，direct JSON client projection 少了 `model: gpt-5.4`。

- Fix：Rust owner 新增 direct response body client-visible field restore；NAPI `projectResponsesClientPayloadForClientJson` 增加 context JSON；TS bridge 只把 requestContext payload/context 透传给 native，并物理删除 TS/JS 本地补字段 helper。

- Verification：Rust focused direct-body model test PASS；native build PASS；focused Jest direct-json-protocol-guard PASS；`verify:sse-architecture-boundary` PASS；`verify:responses-sse-business-module` PASS；sharedmodule/root `tsc --noEmit` PASS；`git diff --check` PASS。

# 2026-06-30: 4444 router-direct default route after 502/403

- Issue：4444 `/v1/responses` direct thinking route 在线出现 `ykk.ykk.gpt-5.4-mini` 502 后切到 `asxs.crsa.gpt-5.4-mini`，随后 403 直接投影给客户端，没有继续进入 routing group `default` route。
- Root cause：ErrorErr05 已能判断 current route exhausted + default route available，但 `executeRouterDirectPipelineForPort` 只设置本轮 flat `metadataForHub.allowedProviders`；递归重进 direct 时 metadata 会重建，Rust default route plan 的 target list 没有跨 retry state 传入下一轮 VR。
- Fix：`RouterDirectRetryState.allowedProvidersOverride` 承载 Rust `planPrimaryExhaustedToDefaultPoolNative` 返回的 default route targets；provider error 后若 current route pool 被排空且 default route 可用，立即消费 Rust plan 并用 override 进入下一次 direct route。`fallbackRoutingPolicyGroup` 命名同步改为 `portRoutingPolicyGroup`，避免把 default route 合同表达成 fallback。
- Red/green：新增 direct 黑盒 `router-direct applies Rust default route plan after current route pool is exhausted by provider errors`，改前复现 502 -> 403 直抛，改后 502 -> 403 -> default route target 成功。
- Verification：focused Jest `direct default route + ErrorErr05 default route + streaming HTTP 403` PASS；`router-direct-pipeline.candidate-exhaustion + router-direct-pipeline` 35/35 PASS；direct 关键切片 4/4 PASS；`tsc --noEmit` PASS；`npm run build:base && npm run install:global` PASS；global `routecodex --version` = `0.90.3346`；`routecodex restart --port 4444` + `/health` ready `0.90.3346`。
- Live evidence：手动 4444 `/v1/responses` probe `openai-responses-router-gpt-5.5-20260630T214854702-432074-5384` 命中 `thinking/gateway-glm-4444-priority-thinking -> ykk[ykk].gpt-5.4-mini` 并 200 成功；该样本未触发 502/403，因此在线 default route error-chain 仍需等真实 provider failure 或专用可控 provider 样本复测。

# 2026-06-30: 5555 provider error leak check after router fix
- 发现：5555 报“错误仍反馈客户端”时，当前全局/本地 dist 最初都没有 `provider.switch_backoff` / `isProviderProtocolBoundaryError` marker，说明上一轮 commit 未部署到正在运行的全局包。
- 动作：`npm run build:base` 通过并生成 `0.90.3342`，随后 `npm run install:global` 安装为 `0.90.3343`；`routecodex restart --port 5555` 后 `/health` 返回 ready 且版本 `0.90.3343`。
- 验证：全局 dist 已包含 provider switch backoff 与 protocol boundary marker；真实 `POST /v1/responses` 到 5555 返回 HTTP 200 completed，没有 client-visible provider error。dry-run CLI 当前缺 `metadataCenterSnapshot`，不能作为本轮闭环证据。

# 2026-06-30: Responses SSE canonical payload moved to Rust
- `responses-sequencer.ts` 不再本地补 `data.type` / `sequence_number`；新增 native wrapper `canonicalizeResponsesSseEventPayloadWithNative()`，Rust owner 是 `responses_sse_event_payload.rs`。
- Rust `canonicalize_responses_sse_event_payload` 负责 canonical payload materialize：缺 `data.type` 时补 event type，`sequenceNumber` 转 `sequence_number`；scalar payload 和 payload type mismatch fail-fast。
- 验证：Rust focused `responses_sse_event_payload` 3/3 PASS；native build PASS；focused Jest 13/13 PASS；`verify:sse-architecture-boundary` PASS；`verify:responses-sse-business-module` PASS；sharedmodule/root TS PASS；`git diff --check` PASS。
- 真实 4444 sample `req_1782794868950_3m64se1xv` replay：`completed=true`、`done=true`、`error=false`、`missingType=false`、`missingSequence=false`。

# 2026-06-30: Responses event serializer canonical-payload slice
- `responses-event-serializer.ts` 不再 wildcard 接受任意 `response.*`，也不再给 payload 自动补 `type`、把 scalar data 包成 `{value}`、或从 envelope 注入 `sequence_number`。
- `responses-sequencer.ts` 在进入 writer 前 materialize canonical payload：`data.type` 必须与 event type 一致，缺失时由 sequencer 边界补齐；serializer 只做 allowlist + object/type 校验 + wire 格式化。
- 红测：`responses-event-serializer-no-salvage.spec.ts` 新增 missing type、scalar data、unknown response-prefixed event 三个反向用例，改前为红，改后转绿。

# 2026-06-30: 4444 repeated stream_closed triage and restart verification
- Latest live failures on 4444 `/v1/responses` matched the same pattern: `stream closed before response.completed` with `UPSTREAM_STREAM_INCOMPLETE`, and the route still hit `search/gateway-glm-4444-priority-search -> ykk[ykk].gpt-5.3-codex-spark` before restart.
- Ran `npm run build:base`, then `npm run install:global`, then `routecodex restart --port 4444`.
- Post-restart evidence: `curl http://127.0.0.1:4444/health` is `ready=true`; last failure line in `/Volumes/extension/.rcc/logs/server-4444.log` is before the last restart marker (`post_restart_fail=false`).
- Version note: `routecodex --version` reports `0.90.3340`, while 4444 health still reports server version `0.90.3337`.

# 2026-06-30: router-direct retry excluded keys restored into MetadataCenter snapshot
- Issue: 4444 router-direct 在 ykk spark 返回 429/`UPSTREAM_STREAM_INCOMPLETE` 后，日志显示 `provider-switch` 已排除 `ykk.ykk.gpt-5.3-codex-spark`，但下一次 `virtual-router-hit` 仍选同一个 provider，随后旧错误直接投影到客户端。
- Root cause: `executeRouterDirectPipelineForPort` 只把 `excludedProviderKeys` 写到 flat metadata；Rust VR direct route 读取的是 `metadataCenterSnapshot.excludedProviderKeys`，因此 retry 排除信号没有进入 VR 真源。
- Fix: `buildMetadataCenterSnapshot()` 将 flat `excludedProviderKeys` 规范化后写入 snapshot；新增 router-direct 429 -> cross-protocol relay handoff 测试，mock route 以 snapshot 为读取口径。
- Verification: focused Jest `direct-passthrough-route-level` 429/502/cross-protocol 组通过；`router-direct-pipeline.candidate-exhaustion` + `direct-decision.upstream-stream-incomplete` 通过；`npm run build:base` 通过；全局安装 `0.90.3337` 后 `routecodex restart --port 4444` + `/health` 通过；online dry-run with `routeHint=search` + excluded ykk 选中 `minimax.key1.MiniMax-M3` / `anthropic-messages`。

- `request-executor-error-action-queue.ts` 的 blocking backoff 序列已收口为 `1s -> 3s -> 5s -> repeat`，对应单测已绿。
- 关键验证：`provider-failure-policy.spec.ts`、`provider-failure-policy-upstream-stream-incomplete.spec.ts`、`request-executor-error-action-queue.spec.ts`、`request-executor-global-error-backoff.spec.ts`、`virtual-router-health-last-provider.spec.ts`、`virtual-router-provider-unavailable-cooldown-native.spec.ts`、`virtual-router-error-classification-top-level-native.spec.ts` 全绿。

# 2026-06-30: Chat JSON->SSE usage alias fallback removed

- 本 slice 继续收口 `sse.chat_stream_projection`：`chat.ts::normalizeChatUsage` 不再接受 `input_tokens/output_tokens`、camelCase `promptTokens/completionTokens/inputTokens/outputTokens/totalTokens`，也不再用 `prompt + completion` 推导缺失 `total_tokens`。
- Chat JSON->SSE encode 现在只接受 canonical chat usage：`prompt_tokens` / `completion_tokens` / `total_tokens`；缺字段或 Responses-style alias 直接生成 `generation_error`，不再 fallback 到 `[DONE]` 成功流。
- 门禁：`verify-sse-architecture-boundary.mjs` 禁止 chat generator 重新出现 usage alias marker 和 total 推导表达式；`chat-sse-usage-no-fallback.spec.ts` 增加 Responses-style alias 与 missing total 的反向测试。
- 验证：focused Jest `chat-sse-usage-no-fallback + chat-sse-usage-roundtrip` 16 passed；`verify:sse-architecture-boundary` PASS；`verify:responses-sse-business-module` PASS；sharedmodule/root `tsc --noEmit` PASS；真实 chat SSE 样本 `req_1782778465399_hrxbpl3tz/provider-response_1.json` 先 materialize 再 JSON->SSE replay 成功，`has_done=true`、`has_error=false`、usage 保持 canonical chat `{completion_tokens:38,prompt_tokens:262815,total_tokens:262846}`。

# 2026-06-30: Responses JSON->SSE usage alias fallback removed

- 本 slice 收口 `sse.responses_encode_projection`：`responses.ts::normalizeUsage` 不再接受 `prompt_tokens` / `completion_tokens` / `cache_read_input_tokens` 兼容字段，也不再用 `input + output` 推导缺失的 `total_tokens`。
- Responses JSON->SSE encode 现在只接受 canonical `usage.input_tokens` / `usage.output_tokens` / `usage.total_tokens`，cached 只接受 canonical `usage.input_tokens_details.cached_tokens`；缺字段或旧 alias 直接生成 `response.error`，不 fallback 成 completed/done。
- 门禁：`verify-sse-architecture-boundary.mjs` 禁止 `responses.ts` 重新出现 `prompt_tokens` / `completion_tokens` / `cache_read_input_tokens` marker；`responses-sse-usage-no-fallback.spec.ts` 增加旧 alias 反向测试。
- 验证：focused Jest `responses-json-to-sse-usage + responses-sse-usage-no-fallback` 6 passed；`verify:sse-architecture-boundary` PASS；`verify:responses-sse-business-module` PASS；sharedmodule/root `tsc --noEmit` PASS；真实 4444 Responses SSE 样本先经 native materialize 再 JSON->SSE replay 成功，`has_completed=true`、`has_done=true`、`has_error=false`、usage 保持 canonical `{input_tokens,input_tokens_details.cached_tokens,output_tokens,total_tokens}`。

# 2026-06-30: priority 语义纠偏
- corrected: priority 是“每次新请求都先试优先级最高项”，不是失败后永久降级的 failover 顺序。
- current-request behavior: 同一请求内出错就按标准 provider switch + 计数切换到下一个；成功则不继续看下一个。
- next-request behavior: 下一次请求重新从 priority 最高项开始，不因上一次失败把它挪后或跳过；只有请求内排除/计数，不做跨请求永久排位变更。

# 2026-06-30: priority 场景临时网络错误逻辑审计
- verified: `priority` 只是路由顺序，不是错误特例；`fetch failed` / `socket hang up` / `network timeout` / SSE decode 这类临时网络错会先进入 `error.provider_failure_policy`，分类为 `recoverable`，再由 `error.execution_decision_consumer` 生成 `ErrorErr05`。
- current-request behavior: 只要 `routePoolRemainingAfterExclusion` 仍有候选，或 `defaultPoolAvailable=true`，`mayProject=false`，执行器会继续 `exclude_and_reroute`，不会立刻 client-visible。
- recovery behavior: 失败 provider 在当前请求链里会被排除/冷却；下一次新请求是否再命中，取决于 VR 里 health/quota/default truth 是否已恢复，不存在 priority 专用的“自动复活”分支。

- `servertool-active-orchestration-audit` 已同步锁新形态：必须保留 `const passthroughResult = ...` 和 `return passthroughResult;`。
- 语义不变：`return_passthrough_bypass` 与 `continue_without_result` 仍都回到相同 passthrough 结果；Rust 继续拥有 response-stage gate/runtime action 语义。

- 验证：focused Jest `execution-stage-shell + servertool-active-orchestration-audit` 37 passed；`cargo test -p servertool-core execution_branch_contract --lib -- --nocapture` 4 passed；sharedmodule TS PASS；`verify:servertool-rust-only` PASS；`verify:function-map-compile-gate` PASS；`verify:architecture-mainline-call-map` PASS；`git diff --check` PASS。

# 2026-06-30: 4444 spark availability check

- Jason 询问 5520 其余正常时，4444 断流是否是 spark availability 问题。
- live 证据：4444/5520 `/health` 均 ready，版本均 `0.90.3331`。
- VR status：4444 `gateway_glm_4444` 的 `default/tools/search/multimodal/web_search` 优先 `fwd.gpt.gpt-5.3-codex-spark`，再 `fwd.minimax.MiniMax-M3`；5520 对应路由主要走 `fwd.paid.gpt-5.4-mini`，因此 4444 问题会集中暴露 spark 路由面。
- 但不能归因成 spark 完全不可用：日志中 4444 default 多次命中 `ykk[ykk].gpt-5.3-codex-spark` 后 `router-direct.send completed`，例如 `openai-responses-router-gpt-5.5-20260630T154650143-428637-1947`、`...T154658331-428639-1949`、`...T154707746-428642-1952`。
- 额外发现：本轮非流式 `/v1/responses` 最小黑盒 4444/5520 都返回 `MALFORMED_RESPONSE`，日志根因为 `Responses conversation request context missing for response capture`；该失败不是 spark availability，而是 direct responses continuation capture/request-context 绑定问题。
- 15:52 Jason 截图说 4444 又停了。复查：`curl http://127.0.0.1:4444/health` ready；两条 `curl --http1.1 -N /v1/responses stream=true` 黑盒均 HTTP 200 且收到 `response.completed`。因此端口未停，截图中的 `HTTP/2` / `stream disconnected before completion` 更像调用端下载/stream 链路或某个具体长请求断流，不是 4444 服务全局不可用。
- Jason 补充“另一个 4444 session 不会有这个问题”。复查最近 4444 日志：无 `response.sse.client_close`，多条 4444 `router-direct.send completed`；坏 session 同时有 `/Volumes/extension/unsloth/download_ornith_397b_q5km_curl.sh` 的 HuggingFace 大文件下载日志，包含旧 `HTTP/2 stream ... CANCEL` 和当前 `curl: (18) Transferred a partial file` 重试。当前判断：这是会话/客户端链路或本地网络负载隔离问题，不是 4444 server 全局故障。

# 2026-06-30: Responses SSE TS fallback surface P0/P1 收口
- 继续 SSE Rust 化第一阶段：`forceSSE` 缺 `sseStream` 时不再由 handler/bridge 做 JSON/chat body -> SSE fallback，必须走 missing-stream fail-fast error path。
- 进一步删除 `responses-sse-bridge` / `responses-response-bridge` 暴露的 SSE error payload builder surface：`buildResponsesSseErrorPayloadForHttp`、`buildResponsesStructuredSseErrorPayloadForHttp`、`buildResponsesMissingSseBridgeErrorPayloadForHttp` 不再是 bridge canonical builder；handler 只保留 transport-local 最小错误帧拼接。
- 门禁同步：`verify:responses-sse-business-module`、`verify:responses-handler-single-bridge-surface`、red-tests 禁止 JSON->SSE fallback 和 bridge-owned SSE error payload helper 复活。
- P2 继续删除 handler 终态扫描：`hasResponsesTerminalSseMarker` / `sawTerminalEvent` / `terminalScanBuffer` 不再出现在 handler；close/error/end 只按 transport `streamEnded` / response close 状态做 closeout，不再解析 `response.completed` / `response.done` / `response.error` 业务帧。
- P3 删除 structured-error passthrough：`buildStructuredSseErrorPayloadForHttp` / `extractStructuredSseErrorPayload` / `sendStructuredSseError` 已移除；force-SSE 缺 stream 不再从 JSON `body.error` 重组 SSE error，而是统一 missing-stream fail-fast。
- P4 将 SSE error event payload builder 收口到 ErrorErr06 owner：新增 `src/server/utils/http-error-mapper.ts::projectSseErrorEventPayload`；`handler-response-sse.ts` 删除本地 `buildTransportLocalSseErrorPayload`，只调用 ErrorErr06 builder 后写帧。
- 已验证：`verify:responses-sse-business-module` PASS；`verify:responses-handler-single-bridge-surface` PASS；`verify:sse-architecture-boundary` PASS；root `tsc --noEmit` PASS；focused Jest `http-error-mapper-timeout + server_responses_sse_business_module_contract + server_responses_sse_surface_single_owner + handler-response-utils.force-sse-json-responses` 24 passed；`git diff --check` PASS。
- 剩余：handler 仍保留 keepalive、timeout、本地最小 error frame 写出、transport closeout；下一步若继续 Rust 化，应把 timeout/error frame plan 收到 Rust response outbound / ErrorErr06 frame planner，TS 只写 Rust 计划好的帧。

# 2026-06-30: stats-manager periodic bucket local day boundary fixed
- 问题：`stats-manager.periods.spec.ts` 第二个用例在 `snapshot()` 内部使用 `Date.now()`，传入的时间参数未生效，导致本地日切边界断言不稳定。
- 修复：在该用例中把 `Date.now` 打桩到 `2026-06-30T16:30:00.000Z`，并在 finally 恢复。此时 `snapshotHistoricalPeriods().daily` 的 period 由本地时区计算，成功落到 `2026-07-01` 而非 UTC 前一天。
- 验证：`npx tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit --pretty false`、`stats-manager.periods.spec.ts` 单测、`executor/token-stats-store.spec.ts`、`executor/usage-logger.spec.ts` 均 PASS。
- 风险：`/daemon/admin` 统计 e2e 只补了 tokenStats 断言；实际跑 1 条 `/daemon-admin.e2e.spec.ts` 的该用例时出现长等待（待环境恢复后补齐），未阻塞本次最小提交。

# 2026-06-30: stats source truth principle tightened
- 原则：数据必须优先来自原始请求/响应本身，能从最原始 payload 直接取到的字段，不允许再从中间上下文或零散传递语义里重算/回读；控制语义继续走 `MetadataCenter`。
- 含义：stats/usage/port/session 这类数据面字段要重新审计，避免用 `MetadataCenter`、`matchedPort`、`routecodexLocalPort`、`metadata.usage` 之类中间链路做第二来源或 fallback。

# 2026-06-30 10000/5555 路由兜底统一为 minimax-m3

# 2026-06-30 VR 在线诊查 live 验证

- 目标：在线验证 VR diagnostics 能正确按端口查询路由组，并能 dry-run 解释命中路径和问题。
- 已实现/验证的诊查面：
  - HTTP: `GET /_routecodex/diagnostics/virtual-router/status`
  - HTTP: `POST /_routecodex/diagnostics/virtual-router/dry-run`
  - CLI: `routecodex port status <port> --json`
  - CLI: `routecodex port dry-run <port> --request-json ... --metadata-json ... --json`
- live 端口状态验证：
  - 5520 route prefix = `gateway_priority_5520`
  - 5555 route prefix = `gateway_priority_5555`
  - 10000 route prefix = `gateway_coding_10000`
- 10000 longcontext 真实在线 dry-run 结论：
  - 短请求会按分类落到 `default`，当前 10000 default 配置是 `minimax.key1.MiniMax-M3`，这不是 longcontext 路径。
  - 使用大 payload 触发 `longcontext` 后，10000 dry-run 命中 `selectedRouteName=longcontext`、`selectedProviderKey=orangeai.key1.glm-5.2`、`candidatePools=["fwd.glm.glm-5.2","fwd.minimax.MiniMax-M3"]`，证明 GLM longcontext 优先。
  - 5555 同样大 payload dry-run 命中 `longcontext -> orangeai.key1.glm-5.2`。
- 当前诊查可正确区分“路径问题”与“样本没触发 longcontext”：如果样本文本不超过 longcontext threshold，诊断看到 M3 是 default route 的配置结果，不是 longcontext priority 错误。
- 新增收口：diagnostics HTTP response 增加 `localPort` / `routingPolicyGroup`，避免多端口进程下 `serverId` 统一显示为主端口导致误判。

- 检查与修正：`/Volumes/extension/.rcc/config.toml`（等同 `~/.rcc/config.toml`）中，端口 `10000` 和 `5555` 的 routingPolicyGroup。
- 修正结果：
  - 10000：`tools/search/web_search` 由 `fwd.minimax.MiniMax-M2.7` 兜底改为 `fwd.minimax.MiniMax-M3`；
    其余所有路由不再含 `mimo.mimo-v2.5` 兜底。
  - 5555：`tools/search/web_search/default/multimodal` 移除 `fwd.minimax.MiniMax-M2.7`，统一以 `fwd.minimax.MiniMax-M3` 作为 fallback（或唯一兜底）。
- 验证：
  - `routecodex config validate` PASS；
  - `routecodex restart --port 5520` 完成（重启后首次健康探针有一次网络抖动回报，但后续进程已重启）；
  - `curl -sS http://127.0.0.1:5520/health`、`http://127.0.0.1:10000/health`、`http://127.0.0.1:5555/health` 均返回 `ready":true`。

# 2026-06-29 router-direct spark reasoning.summary capability gate

- 目标：修复 4444 responses direct 路由到 `gpt-5.3-codex-spark` 时保留 `reasoning.summary` 导致上游 400 的问题。
- 根因：`router-direct` same-protocol direct 做了 target model override (`gpt-5.5` -> `gpt-5.3-codex-spark`)，但没有按最终 target model 的 request capability 剥离不支持参数，导致 provider-request 含 `"reasoning":{"effort":"high","summary":"detailed"}`。
- 设计：保留 `responses -> responses` direct；新增模型能力禁用标记 `no_reasoning_summary`，默认其他 responses GPT model 支持 summary；direct hook 只在 target runtime `modelCapabilities[targetModel]` 显式包含 `no_reasoning_summary` 时删除 `reasoning.summary`，保留 `reasoning.effort`。
- 配置：`~/.rcc/provider/ykk/config.v2.toml` 与 `~/.rcc/provider/cc/config.v2.toml` 的 `gpt-5.3-codex-spark` 标记 `no_reasoning_summary`；`gpt-5.4-mini` 不标记。
- 验证：`npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/server/runtime/http-server/router-direct-pipeline.spec.ts --runInBand` 22/22 PASS；`npx tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit --pretty false` PASS；`cargo test -p router-hotpath-napi provider_bootstrap --lib -- --nocapture` 4 passed；`node sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/scripts/build-native-hotpath.mjs` PASS；`routecodex config validate` PASS；`routecodex restart --port 4444` 后 `/health` ready。
- 在线样本：`~/.rcc/codex-samples/openai-responses/ports/4444/openai-responses-router-gpt-5.5-20260629T234704957-424382-4665/provider-request.json` 显示 `model="gpt-5.3-codex-spark"` 且 `reasoning={"effort":"high"}`；`provider-response.json` 为 200；同日志不再出现该请求的 `reasoning.summary` 400。
- 额外发现：`router-direct` 原先无条件 `MetadataCenter.attach(input.requestPayload)` 会在无 model override 时污染 provider payload；已改为仅在需要写 model override observation 时 attach。

# 2026-06-29 5520 startup correction after forwarder fix

- Correction: earlier `fix(vr): allow same-model forwarder pools` was committed after proving the duplicate-forwarder blocker disappeared, but before proving `routecodex start --port 5520` and `/health` were green. That was incomplete live validation.
- Follow-up config truth: user provided legacy `model_providers.cc` (`base_url=http://152.32.205.164:19090/v1`, `wire_api=responses`, `env_key=CC_OAI_KEY`). Added runtime config file outside repo: `~/.rcc/provider/cc/config.v2.toml`. Did not edit `~/.rcc/config.toml`.
- Live verification:
  - `routecodex config validate` PASS.
  - `routecodex start --port 5520` PASS; server started on `0.0.0.0:5520`, `0.0.0.0:10000`, `0.0.0.0:5555`.
  - `curl -sS http://127.0.0.1:5520/health` -> `{"status":"ok","ready":true,"pipelineReady":true,"server":"routecodex","version":"0.90.3308"}`.
  - `curl -sS http://127.0.0.1:5555/health` -> ready true.
  - `curl -sS http://127.0.0.1:10000/health` -> ready true.
- Reusable lesson: for startup fixes, do not submit or report completion after only removing the first startup blocker. Required evidence is global install/runtime path + actual `routecodex start/restart` + target port `/health` green; if a new config error appears, report as the active blocker before claiming closure.

# 2026-06-29 forwarder same-model multi-pool startup fix

- Symptom: global `routecodex start --port 5520` failed before app init with `[forwarder-config] duplicate forwarder for (protocol='openai', model='gpt-5.3-codex-spark')`, because config has both `fwd.paid.gpt-5.3-codex-spark` and `fwd.gpt.gpt-5.3-codex-spark`.
- Root cause: TS config materializer, provider profile loader, and Rust `ForwarderRegistry::load` all incorrectly enforced `(protocol, model)` uniqueness. This conflicts with explicit forwarder-id routing where paid/free pools can share a model and remain distinct by `fwd.*` id.
- Fix: removed `(protocol, model)` duplicate fail-fast in TS materialize/profile and Rust forwarder loader. Rust `by_model` keeps first entry for legacy model lookup, while explicit route targets continue to resolve by forwarder id.
- Tests: added TS config materialization coverage for two `gpt-5.3-codex-spark` forwarders with distinct provider pools; converted provider profile and Rust forwarder duplicate tests to allow same model under different ids.
- Verification:
  - `PATH=/opt/homebrew/opt/node@22/bin:$PATH node --experimental-vm-modules ./node_modules/jest/bin/jest.js tests/config/provider-v2-loader.spec.ts tests/providers/forwarder-selection.spec.ts --runInBand` PASS, 27 passed.
  - `PATH=/opt/homebrew/opt/node@22/bin:$PATH npx tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit --pretty false` PASS.

# 2026-06-29 10000 MiniMax Anthropic SSE provider-response V2 shell cleanup

- 现象：10000 `/v1/chat/completions` 连续报 `Upstream provider error`，样本 `~/.rcc/codex-samples/openai-chat/ports/10000/req_1782733503705_5aba9660` 的 provider 侧实际已返回完整 Anthropic SSE：`message_start -> tool_use input_json_delta -> message_delta stop_reason=tool_use -> message_stop`。
- 根因分类：不是上游无响应；失败点在 provider response 后处理/SSE 投影链。当前工作树的 `provider-response.ts` 仍接了半成品 `native-provider-response-orchestration-v2.ts` / `native-provider-response-sse-materialize-fallback.ts` duplicate owner/import，和已删除 V2/fallback 壳冲突。
- 修法：`provider-response.ts` 移除 V2/fallback 依赖，回到现有 Rust 真源 `materializeProviderResponseSsePayloadWithNative` + `normalizeProviderResponseEffectPlanWithNative`；保留 TS 仅做 Node Readable stream byte 读取、native 调用、SSE frame 写出和 IO callback；物理删除 untracked duplicate `native-provider-response-orchestration-v2.ts`。
- 回归：新增 `tests/sharedmodule/minimax-anthropic-chat-sse-tool-use.spec.ts`，直接消费 10000 捕获的 MiniMax Anthropic SSE，验证 OpenAI chat SSE 含 `created` / `tool_calls` / `[DONE]`，且不含 `generation_error` / `missing created timestamp`。
- 验证：`minimax-anthropic-chat-sse-tool-use.spec.ts --forceExit` PASS；`verify:hub-response-provider-sse-materialization` PASS（Rust provider_sse 4 passed）；`hub-pipeline-stage-residue-audit -t "provider response orchestration must not grow duplicate V2 owner"` PASS；sharedmodule `tsc` PASS；`git diff --check` PASS。
- 端口分类：同时间窗 5520/5555 日志有 `fetch failed` / HTTP 504 provider-switch 与 `Upstream provider error`，不像 10000 的“provider SSE 已完整返回后投影失败”；后续不要把三者直接归为同一个 SSE codec 根因。
- 已知无关红：`tests/sharedmodule/provider-response-rust-plan.spec.ts` 仍有 5 个既有红点，集中在 stale Responses store expectation、缺 `created/created_at` fixture 被 SSE fail-fast 拒绝、旧 `__rt.stopGatewayContext` 期望；不作为本 10000 MiniMax SSE 回归闭环证据。

# 2026-06-29 anthropic chat projection created fix

# 2026-06-29 responses continuation request-label rebind blocker

- 目标：继续排查 `missing_request_context` 在线回放失败，确认是 capture 没写入还是 response 侧拿错了 request key。
- 结论：`request-executor` 在 providerContext resolve 后会把 `input.requestId` 重绑到 provider 级 request id，但 `sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/conversion/hub/response/provider-response.ts` 里 `resolveResponsesConversationRequestLabelWithinCore()` 仍优先使用 `MetadataCenter.requestTruth.requestId`。该字段在 handler 侧先写入旧 request id，导致 store 已 rebind 到新 key 后，response 侧继续用旧 key 查找，触发 `record.missing_request_context`。
- 处理：把 response 侧 canonical label 选择改成“当前 requestLabel 优先，requestTruth 仅 fallback”，再补一条重绑回归测试。

# 2026-06-29 SSE parser no-recovery slice

- 目标：删除 sse-to-json decode path 的 parser recovery 静默失败；malformed SSE frame 必须暴露为失败，不能被 native parser/filter 跳过后继续成功。
- 根因：Rust `parse_sse_stream_chunk_with_config()` 用 `.filter(|entry| entry.success || config.enable_event_recovery)`，在 recovery=false 时反而丢弃失败 entry，TS converter 看不到坏帧；Responses/Gemini malformed frame 红测会成功返回。
- 改动：Rust parser 物理移除 `enable_event_recovery` 字段和 invalid JSON recovery 分支，stream parser 保留所有 parse result；TS parser 默认 `enableEventRecovery=false`；Responses/Anthropic/Gemini converters 显式关闭 recovery，并对 `!success || !event` 必抛；协议不匹配也必抛；response-builder config 默认 recovery=false；architecture gate 禁止 decode projection 复活 `enableEventRecovery: true` / `!strictMode`。
- 已验证：`cargo test -p router-hotpath-napi hub_resp_inbound_sse_stream_sniffer --lib -- --nocapture` PASS；`node sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/scripts/build-native-hotpath.mjs` PASS；`npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/sharedmodule/sse-parser-no-recovery.spec.ts --runInBand` PASS；`npm run verify:sse-architecture-boundary` PASS；`PATH=/opt/homebrew/opt/node@22/bin:$PATH npx tsc -p sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/tsconfig.json --pretty false` PASS；scoped `git diff --check` PASS。
- 追加验证：移除 Rust recovery 字段后重跑 `cargo test -p router-hotpath-napi hub_resp_inbound_sse_stream_sniffer --lib -- --nocapture` PASS；`sse-parser-no-recovery.spec.ts` PASS；`verify:sse-architecture-boundary` PASS；sharedmodule `tsc` PASS；残留扫描只剩 `eq_ignore_ascii_case`，不是 silent ignore 语义。

# 2026-06-30 servertool rustification audit

- 现状：`docs/architecture/function-map.yml` 已把 servertool 主语义 owner 基本全部挂到 Rust `servertool-core` / `router-hotpath-napi`，但 `docs/architecture/mainline-call-map.yml` 里 `servertool.hook_skeleton.mainline` 仍是 `binding pending`，说明 runtime 主线还没完全锚定。
- TS 真语义残留重点：
  - `engine-orchestration-shell.ts` 仍含 stopless 本地 JSON parse / `readNativeFunction('planStoplessExecutionJson')`。
  - `pending-session.ts` 仍做文件 IO + JSON parse/atomic write。
  - `pre-command-hooks.ts` 仍做 config 文件 IO、缓存、shell/jq/runtime-script 执行编排。
  - `response-stage-orchestration-shell.ts` 仍做 response-stage gate / runtime control 写回 / orchestration 触发。
  - `execution-stage-shell.ts` / `execution-queue-shell.ts` / `execution-handler-materialization-shell.ts` / `registry-*` / `engine-*` / `auto-hook-caller.ts` / `orchestration-blocks.ts` / `metadata-center-carrier.ts` / `progress-log-block.ts` / `log/progress-file.ts` 仍保留薄壳、IO、写回、记录、或 native bridge glue。
- 清理方向：
  1. 先收 `pending-session` / `pre-command-hooks` / `engine-orchestration` 这三块残余语义，再收 execution/response orchestration glue。
  2. registry / selection / preflight / runtime-action / skip / outcome / handler / state / dispatch 继续按单一 Rust owner 逐块拆，TS 只留最小 native wrapper。
  3. 薄壳判定标准：只要 TS 还在做 JSON parse、文件 IO、状态机分支、重试/选择/投影决策、或直接写 runtime control，就不算“已 rust 化完成”。
- 改动：物理删除未跟踪 `provider_response_orchestration_v2.rs`、`native-provider-response-orchestration-v2.ts`、`native-provider-response-sse-materialize-fallback.ts`；清掉 function/verification map 中未提交的 `hub.resp_chatprocess_orchestration_v2` 注册；新增 residue audit，禁止这些 duplicate owner 文件和 feature_id 复活。
- 已验证：新增 focused audit 先红，命中 3 个 duplicate owner 文件；删除后 `hub-pipeline-stage-residue-audit.spec.ts -t "provider response orchestration must not grow duplicate V2 owner"` PASS。
- 缺口：本 slice 是错误 owner 防复活，不代表 Wave 6 provider-response 主线已闭合；下一步仍需基于现有 Rust `executeHubPipelineWithNative` / `normalizeProviderResponseEffectPlanWithNative` 真源继续收口 response conversion host。

# 2026-06-29 SSE chat stats event-type fail-fast slice

- 目标：继续 SSE 收口，删除 `chat-json-to-sse-converter.ts` 里 `updateStats()` 对缺失 `event/event.type` 的隐式兜底，避免统计层把坏事件当作 unknown 继续跑。
- 改动：`updateStats()` 现在要求 `event?.event || event?.type` 必须是非空字符串，否则直接抛 `Chat SSE event missing event/type for stats update`；`verify-sse-architecture-boundary.mjs` 与 `sse-no-silent-failure.spec.ts` 同步锁死旧表达式 `const et = (event && (event.event || event.type)) || 'unknown'`。
- 验证：`npm run verify:sse-architecture-boundary` PASS；`PATH=/opt/homebrew/opt/node@22/bin:$PATH npx tsc -p sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/tsconfig.json --pretty false` PASS；`npm run verify:function-map-compile-gate` PASS。
- 边界：本 slice 只改 SSE 统计路径，不碰 function-map 文档、servertool、Hub Pipeline 或 Virtual Router。

# 2026-06-29 SSE chat usage invalid fail-fast slice

- 目标：继续 SSE TS cleanup，删除 Chat JSON->SSE usage normalization 对坏 token 字段的静默丢弃；缺 usage 可省略，但出现坏 usage 必须显式失败。
- 改动：`event-generators/chat.ts::normalizeChatUsage()` 现在对非对象 usage、坏 token、缺 token fields 抛 `Invalid Chat usage.*`；新增 `tests/sharedmodule/chat-sse-usage-no-fallback.spec.ts` 锁住 missing usage 省略、invalid usage 输出 generation_error 且不发送 `[DONE]`；SSE gate 禁止旧 `return undefined` 丢坏 usage 结构复活。
- 已验证：focused Jest `chat-sse-usage-no-fallback + chat-sse-usage-roundtrip` PASS；`npm run verify:sse-architecture-boundary` PASS；scoped `git diff --check` PASS。
- 当前缺口：sharedmodule `tsc` 被并行 servertool 脏改挡住，红点在 `registry-projection-shell.ts` / `skeleton-config.ts`，不是本 SSE slice 引入；本轮不碰 servertool。

# 2026-06-29 SSE chat decoded usage invalid fail-fast slice

- 目标：继续 SSE TS cleanup，删除 Chat SSE->JSON decode 对坏 usage 的静默丢弃；坏 usage 不能在 `normalizeChatUsage()` 返回 null 后被 `buildUsageInfo()` 省略。
- 改动：`chat-sse-to-json-converter.ts::normalizeChatUsage()` 现在对非对象 usage、坏 token、缺 token fields 抛 `Invalid Chat usage.*`；缓存 token 字段同样显式校验；`chat-sse-usage-roundtrip.spec.ts` 增加 invalid decoded usage 反向测试；SSE gate 禁止旧 `ChatUsage | null` 和 `return null` 丢坏 usage 结构复活。
- 已验证：focused Jest `chat-sse-usage-roundtrip + chat-sse-usage-no-fallback` PASS；`npm run verify:sse-architecture-boundary` PASS；sharedmodule `tsc` PASS；scoped `git diff --check` PASS。

# 2026-06-29 SSE chat partial response no synthetic truth slice

- 目标：继续 SSE TS cleanup，删除 Chat SSE->JSON `aggregateSseStream()` partial response 的 synthetic truth 兜底；partial response 不得用空 `id`、`created=0` 或 `{role:'assistant',content:''}` 补齐坏状态。
- 改动：`buildPartialResponse()` 现在要求 current response 已有非空 id、正数 created、非空 model，并要求每个 choice 已有 message；缺失时抛 `Chat SSE partial response missing *`。SSE gate 禁止旧 `id || ''`、`created || 0`、`message || { role: 'assistant', content: '' }` 复活。
- 测试：`chat-sse-usage-roundtrip.spec.ts` 增加 aggregate partial 正向回归，证明 partial response 使用真实 upstream id/created/message，不依赖 synthetic fallback。
- 已验证：focused Jest `chat-sse-usage-roundtrip.spec.ts` PASS（12 tests）；`npm run verify:sse-architecture-boundary` PASS；scoped `git diff --check` PASS。
- 当前缺口：sharedmodule `tsc` FAIL，红点在 `sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/conversion/hub/response/provider-response.ts` 引用已删除的 `native-provider-response-orchestration-v2.js` / `native-provider-response-sse-materialize-fallback.js`，不属于本 SSE slice；本轮不碰 Hub/response 并行改动。

# 2026-06-28 error policy / priority mode closeout slice

- 已锁当前真实问题：
  - provider error 不能直接返回客户端，必须先进入统一 ErrorErr01-06 链，由 `ErrorErr05ExecutionDecision` 决定是否切换或投影。
  - `priority` 模式下，`ykk` 仍有效时不应命中 `asxs` / `XL`；Rust `ForwarderStrategy::Priority` 是 strict ordered failover，只有 `ykk` 不可选时才允许下沉。
- 已确认的 live 证据：
  - `curl http://127.0.0.1:5555/health` 返回 `status=ok ready=true pipelineReady=true version=0.90.3318`。
  - 5520 样本目录里存在 `ykk.ykk.gpt-5.4-mini` / `ykk.ykk.gpt-5.5` 的实际命中，说明 priority 命中链本身是可工作的。
- 已确认的 backoff 证据：
  - `request-executor-provider-failure-plan` 已接到 `error.backoff_action_queue`，并消费 `1s -> 3s -> 5s` 的 blocking wait 序列。
- 当前任务形态：
  - 不继续打补丁；按 `docs/goals/error-policy-decision-consumer-closeout-plan.md` 做 root-cause closeout、黑盒/白盒/在线复测和文档门禁收口。

  - 0.90.3320 live 5555 thinking 请求：`openai-responses-orangeai.key1-glm-5.2-20260629T075226103-417896-2931` status 200。
  - 0.90.3320 live 5555 provider error 链：`openai-responses-XLC.key1-glm-5.2-20260629T075239880-417897-2932` 先记录 `provider.error_action_backoff_wait delayMs=1000`，再 `provider-switch ... switch=exclude_and_reroute ... status=429 code=PROVIDER_BUSINESS_ERROR`，后续由 `orangeai.key1.glm-5.2` 接管，usage 显示 attempts=2 retries=1；未出现旧 `PROVIDER_NOT_AVAILABLE`。
  - 0.90.3320 live 5555 search 样本 `req_1782690770505_a5f982cc` 显示版本 `0.90.3320`；发生 MiniMax M3/M2.7 多次 `error_action_backoff_wait` + `provider-switch`，最终是 `HTTP_400 invalid params, tool result's tool id() not found (2013)`。这是 request/contract malformed tool history 边界，不等同旧 `PROVIDER_NOT_AVAILABLE` 风暴；但不能用它证明所有 search special_400 都已业务闭环。
  - 0.90.3320 live 5520 priority：07:51-07:54 多条 `virtual-router-hit` 均为 `gateway-priority-5520-priority-* -> ykk[ykk].gpt-5.5`，覆盖 coding / longcontext / thinking；未见 asxs / XL 命中。
- 当前剩余风险：
  - `special_400` / malformed tool history 的最终投影仍需按 request-contract 边界单独审计，避免和 provider availability 错误混判。
  - 本轮未新增人工构造的 managed-port 5555 受控 401/403 live 场景；该矩阵已由黑盒强制错误覆盖，managed live 覆盖了自然 429/business error 与 400/ECONNRESET switch。

# 2026-06-29 debug system audit for error numbering redesign

- 现状：`debug.unified_surface` 只做治理壳，覆盖 diag artifact / snapshot / logger / harness / policy observation；它明确禁止吸收 runtime diagnostics 语义，也没有现成 `500-1xx/2xx/3xx` 编码体系。
- 现状：错误主链仍归 `error.mainline`，当前真源是 `ErrorErr01SourceRaised -> ErrorErr02HostCaptured -> ErrorErr03RuntimeClassified -> ErrorErr05ExecutionDecision -> ErrorErr06ClientProjected`；`ErrorErr04` 在 call-map 里存在，但 manifest node_ids 里缺位，说明编号体系本身还不完全整齐。
- 现状：`src/debug/diag/error-artifact.ts` 只落 `message/code/statusCode/status/details/stack`，没有内部/外部错误分层编码；`http-error-mapper.ts` 的 client projection 仍按 `ErrorErr05` decision + HTTP payload 形态工作。
- 结论：你提的“内部错误 500-1xx/2xx/3xx、外部错误不混入内部错误包裹”不是现有 debug surface 的自然扩展，属于要先改顶层错误合同的设计变更，不是单纯补一个 debug 子系统就能落地。

# 2026-06-29 internal error numbering debug system implementation

- 目标：实现 `debug.internal_error_numbering`，内部 RouteCodex debug error 使用 `500-1xx/2xx/3xx`，外部/upstream/provider/client 错误只作为 `ExternalErrorLink` 关联，禁止包成内部 envelope。
- 改动：新增 `src/debug/internal-error/*` 唯一 owner（registry/envelope/external-link/projection/guards），`src/debug/index.ts` 导出；`DebugErrorDiagArtifactRecord` 增加 optional `internalError` / `externalError`，保持旧 `message/code/status/statusCode/details/stack` 兼容。
- 架构合同：新增 `debug.internal_error_numbering` function-map / verification-map；新增 `internal_error_numbering.mainline` call-map、binding budget、mainline manifest、wiki review surface、HTML render；新增 `verify:internal-error-numbering` gate。

  - `curl http://127.0.0.1:5555/health` 返回 `status=ok ready=true pipelineReady=true version=0.90.3289`。
- live continuation probe 未闭环：

# 2026-06-28 continuation immutable interval correction

- Jason 明确纠偏：Responses continuation 只能在 response Chat Process 出口 save、下一轮 request Chat Process 入口 restore；两者之间的 `resp_outbound` / SSE / server handler / adapter / store transport / `req_inbound` 只能做语义等价归一化、投影、传输、scope 校验和释放。
- 任何在 save 后到 restore 前做语义转换、上下文恢复、history/tool 修补、required_action 推断、stopless/servertool guidance 注入、request rebuild 的逻辑都会造成中间操作丢失，必须按 owner 越界删除并回 Chat Process owner 修。
- 已同步重点标注到 `AGENTS.md`、`.agents/skills/rcc-dev-skills/SKILL.md`、`references/25-protocol-sse-continuation-boundary.md`、`references/24-node-contract-debug-method.md`；两个 reference 文件在 `.agents/` ignore 下，提交时需要 `git add -f`。

# 2026-06-28 10000 longcontext / provider business error closeout

- 现场根因：
  - 10000 旧 400 样本 `~/.rcc/codex-samples/openai-chat/ports/10000/req_1782617466845_00cdbec9` 为 965 messages / 42 tools / ~1.42M message chars，VR 同时有 `search:last-tool-search|longcontext:token-threshold`，但 search 优先级压过 longcontext，先打到 `minimax.key1.MiniMax-M2.7`，上游报 context window 400。
  - 10000 旧 502 样本的上游 HTTP 200 business error（`该模型访问量过大，请稍后再试`）被 `resolveProviderBusinessResponseError` 标成 `MALFORMED_RESPONSE/status=200`，HTTP 投影再包装成 generic 502。
- 已收口：
  - Rust VR classifier 将 `longcontext` 优先级调到 `search` 之前，并补 `longcontext_overrides_search_continuation_when_context_is_too_large`。
  - provider business error 改为 `PROVIDER_BUSINESS_ERROR`，保留 upstream code/message；容量/限流类中文/英文错误投影 429，非限流业务错误投影 400，不再伪装成 malformed response。
  - `http-error-mapper` 对 `PROVIDER_BUSINESS_ERROR` 直接投影 upstream message/code，避免把未明确映射的 provider business error 包成 502。
  - stopless install blocker 已对齐：client-visible terminal summary 为 `停止检查已收敛`，gate 禁止旧内部英文 `stopless budget exhausted` 泄漏。
- 已验证：
  - `cargo test -p router-hotpath-napi virtual_router_engine::classifier --lib -- --nocapture` 通过，23/23。
  - `pnpm jest tests/providers/core/runtime/provider-auto-retry-business-error.spec.ts tests/providers/core/runtime/provider-2056-classification.spec.ts tests/server/utils/http-error-mapper-public-leak.spec.ts --runInBand` 通过，20/20。
  - `npm run verify:servertool-rust-only` 通过。
  - `npx tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit --pretty false` 通过。
  - `git diff --check` 通过。
  - `PATH=/opt/homebrew/opt/node@22/bin:$PATH ROUTECODEX_BUILD_RESTART_ONLY=1 ROUTECODEX_INSTALL_VERIFY_PORT=10000 ./scripts/install-global.sh` 最终通过，installed `routecodex/rcc 0.90.3285`；`routecodex restart --port 10000` 通过；`curl http://127.0.0.1:10000/health` 返回 `status=ok ready=true pipelineReady=true version=0.90.3285`。
  - live 10000 log：`longcontext/gateway-coding-10000-priority-longcontext` 命中，provider request 样本为 `glm-5.2`、1100+ messages、41 tools，不再是 MiniMax-M2.7 search route。
  - live 10000 log：`该模型访问量过大，请稍后再试` 记录为 `statusCode=429 errorCode=PROVIDER_BUSINESS_ERROR upstreamCode=provider_status_10163` 并 provider switch，不再是 502/MALFORMED_RESPONSE。
- 剩余缺口：
  - executor 附加 Jest 中 `request-executor-provider-response.usage` 通过；`request-executor-provider-send-failure.abort` 的旧 SSE decode retry 断言失败，`request-executor.spec` 因 native export 测试入口不匹配失败。这是并行/既有 executor 测试缺口，不影响本轮 400/502 live closeout，但后续需单独收口。

# 2026-06-28 Route Metadata / Preselected Route audit closeout slice

- 追加边界确认（Jason 纠偏）：
  - Continuation 只是 `/v1/responses` 协议 save/restore 边界：响应 Chat Process 出口保存，请求 Chat Process 入口恢复。
  - 保存后到下一次恢复前，中间不得对 response/request history 做转换、清理、裁剪、重排、补偿或修补；否则会丢 tool/history/stopless 上下文。
  - `req_inbound` / `resp_outbound` 只允许做非破坏性入口归一化和客户端投影/transport handoff；内容治理必须在保存前的 response Chat Process 或恢复后的 request Chat Process。
  - 控制语义跨边界必须走 MetadataCenter，禁止塞进 request/response payload/history。
  - 已将该规则固化到 `docs/architecture/wiki/responses-continuation-mainline-source.md`、`docs/architecture/function-map.yml`、`docs/architecture/verification-map.yml` 与 `.agents/skills/rcc-dev-skills/references/25-protocol-sse-continuation-boundary.md`。
  - 新增 skill reference 受 `.gitignore:92 .agents/` 影响，不会被普通 `git status` 显示；若要提交该 skill 文件，需明确 force add。
  - 已验证：`npm run verify:function-map-compile-gate`、`npm run verify:architecture-wiki-sync`、`npm run verify:architecture-wiki-html-sync`、`npm run verify:architecture-review-surface-light`、`git diff --check` 均通过。

- 审计结论初筛：
  - `Hub Pipeline` 的 route metadata / preselectedRoute 真源应收口到 Rust `hub.route_metadata_surface` + `vr.metadata_center_surface`。
  - TS bridge 只允许传 `MetadataCenter` 绑定和 native input，不应再做 `retryProviderKey` / `routeHint` / `preselectedRoute` 推导。
  - `responses.continuation.mainline` 的 request restore / hook restore 边需要继续往 mainline call map 锚定，不能再塞回 handler/bridge。
- 已做改动：
  - 新增 `verify:route-metadata-preselected-route-owner` 架构 gate。
  - TS request-stage bridge 已去掉 `routerEngine.route(...)` 和 `retryProviderKey` 推导。
  - Responses request bridge 已去掉 `providerProtocol: 'openai-responses'`、`routeHint`、`retryProviderKey` 的写入。
  - Rust route metadata / VR metadata 已开始收口到 `metadataCenterSnapshot` / `runtimeControl` / `continuation`。
- 当前风险：
  - 旧测试仍按“TS bridge 负责 route 决策”和“responsesResume 旧路径”断言，必须同步改成新 owner 语义后再算闭环。
  - `responses.continuation.mainline` 仍需要补 request restore / hook restore 边的实际 anchored symbols，现阶段不能宣称完成。
- 收口结果：
  - `scripts/architecture/verify-route-metadata-preselected-route-owner.mjs` 已接入 `verify:architecture-ci-longtail`，锁住 TS request-stage bridge 不得调用 `routerEngine.route(...)` / 推导 `retryProviderKey`，Responses bridge 不得写 `providerProtocol: 'openai-responses'` / `routeHint` / `retryProviderKey`，Rust route metadata / VR metadata 不得读 top-level route fallback。
  - `hub_pipeline_blocks/router_metadata_input.rs` 只从 `metadataCenterSnapshot.runtimeControl`、`metadataCenterSnapshot.continuationContext.responsesResume`、typed request semantics 读取 route metadata；不再读 top-level `providerProtocol/routeHint/sessionId/conversationId/responsesResume` 或 metadata.runtime_control retryProviderKey。
  - `virtual_router_engine/routing/metadata.rs` 只从 `runtimeControl.providerProtocol` 和标准 `continuation` 解析 routing key；旧 `responsesResume.previousRequestId` 路由恢复路径已移除。
  - `responses.continuation.mainline` 已锚定 `rct-03 buildCapturedRelayResumeRequestContextForHttp -> captureReqInboundResponsesContextSnapshot` 与 `rct-04 captureReqInboundResponsesContextSnapshot -> captureReqInboundResponsesContextSnapshotWithNative`；当前统计为 anchored=4 / partial=3 / pending=0。
- 已验证：
  - `npm run verify:route-metadata-preselected-route-owner` 通过。
  - `npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/modules/llmswitch/bridge/responses-request-bridge.metadata-center.spec.ts tests/sharedmodule/hub-pipeline-preselected-route.spec.ts tests/sharedmodule/hub-pipeline-router-metadata.spec.ts --runInBand` 通过，23/23。
  - `cargo test -p router-hotpath-napi metadata --lib -- --nocapture` 通过，118/118。
  - `npx tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit --pretty false` 通过。
  - `npm run verify:architecture-review-surface-light` 通过。
  - `npm run verify:function-map-compile-gate` 通过。
- 剩余风险：
  - 本轮未做 live 真实请求重放；只能宣称架构 gate、单测/focused Rust、TS 类型和 review surface 通过，不能宣称线上流量闭环。
  - `responses.continuation.mainline` 仍有 3 条 partial 边（rct-01/rct-02/rct-05），但 request restore / hook restore 两条目标边已 anchored。

# 2026-06-27 Hub Pipeline boundary / Responses continuation store-resume closeout

- 本轮收口：`Responses` continuation restore/save 逻辑继续归 Chat Process / conversation store owner；`ReqInbound` 不再承载 resume/session-scope/tool_outputs lift，`RespOutbound/SSE` 不做 continuation 逻辑，只接 finalized semantic payload。
- 新增黑盒：`tests/sharedmodule/responses-continuation-store.spec.ts` 覆盖跨请求 `response save -> response outbound release -> next request restore -> chat bridge mapping`，证明普通 pending operation 的 `function_call` / `function_call_output` 不在两个区间丢失。
- stopless 修复：`resume_responses_conversation_payload` 在 submit_tool_outputs 追加后立即做 canonical history normalize + stopless auto hook pair collapse；payload.input 与 meta.fullInput 同源，下一轮 req inbound 不再承担逻辑补偿。
- 额外验证阻塞清理：`sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/scripts/tests/run-matrix-ci.mjs` 删除两个已不存在脚本的 stale matrix entry，恢复 residue gate。
- 已验证：
  - `cargo test -p router-hotpath-napi shared_responses_conversation --lib -- --nocapture` 通过，35/35。
  - `cargo test -p router-hotpath-napi req_process_stage1_tool_governance --lib -- --nocapture` 通过，39/39。
  - `cargo test -p router-hotpath-napi hub_pipeline --lib -- --nocapture` 通过，225/225。
  - `node sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/scripts/build-native-hotpath.mjs` 通过。
  - `npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/sharedmodule/responses-continuation-store.spec.ts --runInBand` 通过，38/38。
  - `npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/sharedmodule/hub-pipeline.metadata-center-provider-protocol.spec.ts tests/sharedmodule/hub-pipeline-stage-residue-audit.spec.ts --runInBand` 通过，150/150。
  - `npx tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit --pretty false` 通过。
  - `npx tsc -p sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/tsconfig.json --pretty false` 通过。
- 观察：当前工作树仍有大量无关脏改动；提交必须只 stage 本轮边界/continuation/store-resume 相关文件。

# 2026-06-27 providerProtocol MetadataCenter-only closeout

# 2026-06-27 removed unused provider families slice

- 本轮授权删除范围：qwen / iflow / antigravity / windsurf / gemini-cli 的未使用 provider family 入口；Metadata Center 保持核心功能，不删除。
- 已收口：Rust `req_outbound_stage3_compat` qwen 模块与 qwen/qwenchat compat 测试、qwen provider bootstrap/header 注入、iflow scripts/config/sample replay、antigravity virtual-router legacy scripts、qwen token-daemon/provider-utils/oauth/camoufox 自动登录入口、CLI 示例里的 qwen provider 引导。
- 验证：`npx tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit --pretty false` 通过。
- Rust focused gate：`cargo test -p router-hotpath-napi req_outbound_stage3_compat --lib -- --nocapture` 已编译并运行，154 passed / 1 failed；失败为既有 DeepSeek web 内容断言 `test_resp_profile_chat_deepseek_web_harvests_tool_calls_from_rcc_container_only`，不是 qwen/iflow 删除路径。

- 现场错误：`/v1/chat/completions` 入口选到 Anthropic upstream 后，响应解析仍按 OpenAI chat SSE 解码，报 `OpenAI chat SSE response did not contain choices array`。
- 根因确认：旧链路曾从 client entry endpoint 写入 `runtime_control.providerProtocol=openai-chat`，VR 选中 provider 后无法覆盖，导致 provider 真协议和 response parser 使用协议不一致。
- 本轮收口：
  - `buildRequestMetadata()` 不再从 entry endpoint 推导/写入 `providerProtocol`。
  - `request-executor` 只在 provider handle 初始化协议确定后写入 MetadataCenter；已有相同值 no-op，冲突 fail-fast。
  - `servertool` carrier、adapter context、usage aggregator 不再读 flat/nested `providerProtocol` 兜底，只读 MetadataCenter runtime_control。
  - provider runtime context / factory 不再用 `providerTypeToProtocol(providerType)` 推导协议 fallback。
- 验证：
  - `npm run jest:run -- --runTestsByPath tests/server/runtime/http-server/request-executor.metadata-center.contract.spec.ts tests/red-tests/servertool_provider_protocol_metadata_center_only.test.ts tests/server/runtime/http-server/executor/servertool-adapter-context.spec.ts tests/server/runtime/http-server/executor/usage-aggregator.spec.ts --runInBand` 通过，45/45。
  - `npx tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit --pretty false` 通过。
  - 固定串扫描确认核心路径无 `const flat = target?.providerProtocol`、无 `nestedRuntimeControl?.providerProtocol`、无 `providerTypeToProtocol(providerType)`。
- 剩余观察：`sharedmodule/llmswitch-core/src/servertool/handlers/memory/cache-writer.ts` 仍有 cache/debug metadata 文本输出读取 `options.metadata?.providerProtocol`，不在 normal request/response/provider payload 链路；后续若要全库零容忍，可单独按 memory/cache owner 收口。
